evals.prompt: Create an interactive flow diagram for a user onboarding flow: Welcome → Profile Setup → Connect Account → Tutorial → Dashboard. Each step should be clickable to see details about what happens on that screen.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file with D3.js rendering a 5-node linear flow at Level 1, with click-to-expand showing screen details at Level 2/3. Nodes should be visually styled with SDS light theme (warm canvas, white cards), with smooth transitions between levels.

evals.prompt: Build me an interactive user flow for an e-commerce checkout: Browse → Cart → Shipping → Payment → Confirmation, with error handling for payment failure and address validation. Include decision diamonds for the validation steps and highlight the happy path.
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file with D3.js showing a checkout flow with decision diamonds for payment/address validation, error path nodes with red styling, and a visually distinct happy path. SDS light theme with warm canvas and semantic status colors.

evals.prompt:
Turn this into an interactive flow diagram:

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A([Start]) --> B[Search Products]
    B --> C{Found results?}
    C -->|Yes| D[Product Detail]
    C -->|No| E[No Results Page]
    E --> B
    D --> F{In Stock?}
    F -->|Yes| G[Add to Cart]
    F -->|No| H[Notify When Available]
    G --> I[Checkout]
    I --> J([Order Confirmed])
```
evals.expected_output: A standalone HTML file converting the Mermaid diagram into an interactive D3 visualization with proper node types (start/end as pills, decisions as diamonds, screens as rectangles). SDS light theme with warm canvas background.
